title: Darling Ingredients Reports Weak Earnings on Poor Sales for RD Joint Venture
content: Darling Ingredients reported weak second-quarter earnings, attributing the lion's share of that downturn to poor results from its joint-venture renewable diesel business. The company said that earnings for the quarter came in at a net income of $12.7 million - down significantly from $78.9 million in Q2 2024. Much of that downturn came from lower sales for its Diamond Green Diesel joint venture with Valero Energy.
author: Analysts Account
